ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion record */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for the size conversion (e.g., Australian, American) */,
  "size_xxsmall" TEXT /* Size corresponding to Extra Extra Small (XXS) */,
  "size_xs" TEXT /* Size corresponding to Extra Small (XS) */,
  "size_s" TEXT /* Size corresponding to Small (S) */,
  "size_m" TEXT /* Size corresponding to Medium (M) */,
  "size_l" TEXT /* Size corresponding to Large (L) */,
  "size_xl" TEXT /* Size corresponding to Extra Large (XL) */,
  "size_xxl" TEXT /* Size corresponding to Extra Extra Large (XXL) */,
  "size_3xl" TEXT /* Size corresponding to 3XL */,
  "size_4xl" TEXT /* Size corresponding to 4XL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., dress, top, pants) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "fabric" TEXT /* Fabric type of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the catalog */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product associated with these sizes */,
  "size_xxsmall" INTEGER /* Availability of Extra Extra Small (XXS) size */,
  "size_xs" INTEGER /* Availability of Extra Small (XS) size */,
  "size_s" INTEGER /* Availability of Small (S) size */,
  "size_m" INTEGER /* Availability of Medium (M) size */,
  "size_l" INTEGER /* Availability of Large (L) size */,
  "size_xl" INTEGER /* Availability of Extra Large (XL) size */,
  "size_xxl" INTEGER /* Availability of Extra Extra Large (XXL) size */,
  "size_3xl" INTEGER /* Availability of 3XL size */,
  "size_4xl" INTEGER /* Availability of 4XL size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the platform */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's shipping address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "inventory_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product whose inventory is being logged */,
  "change_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of inventory change (positive or negative) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory change occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change (e.g., restock, sale) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the inventory change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number to contact the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "credit_terms" TEXT /* Credit terms offered by the supplier */,
  "lead_time" TEXT /* Lead time for deliveries from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product supplied */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier providing the product */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time for deliveries from the supplier for this product */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for this product from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for account notifications */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
